prestazioni: Engine: 3.4L DOHC inline-6 (XK engine code: XK6) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Cunningham conrods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 8,000 RPM reliability. Forced induction via a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.2 bar boost) with a custom Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and dual 38mm Turbosmart Race Port blow-off valves. Fuel system upgraded with a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a custom fuel rail from Fuel Injector Clinic. Ignition system features a M&W Pro-12 CDI box and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs gapped at 0.020".

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a twin-disc Tilton 7.25" carbon clutch and a Quaife ATB differential (4.55:1 final drive). Custom driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop with CV joints and a billet aluminum yoke. Rear axle housing reinforced with a Salisbury-style differential carrier from Jaguar Classic Works and 31-spline axles from Strange Engineering.

Suspension & Braking: Full Ohlins TTX40 coilover kit with 24-way adjustable compression and rebound damping, custom-valved for the XKSS chassis. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1003K) replace all factory rubber. Braking system features 6-piston AP Racing CP6146 calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors (floating hats from Racing Brake) and Ferodo DS3000 pads. Stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge and a Tilton 7/8" master cylinder with a remote reservoir.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny XKSS kit (hand-laid by Seibon Carbon) with extended fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear), a ducktail spoiler, and a front splitter with integrated canards. Custom aluminum side-exit exhaust outlets (dual 3.5" tips) from Burns Stainless, polished to a mirror finish. Lightweight aluminum hood with a functional NACA duct for engine bay cooling, secured by Dzus fasteners.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro SPG XL seats (HANS-compatible) with custom embroidery (Jaguar D-Type racing stripes). MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter) with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations. Custom gauge cluster from Stack Instruments (ST8100) with oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR readouts. Roll cage designed by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 6-point) with removable door bars for street legality.

Wheels & Finishing: Custom 17x9.5" (front) and 17x11" (rear) forged wheels from BBS (LM-R design) with a 5x120 bolt pattern, shod in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear). Gold anodized wheel centers with Jaguar Racing green accents. Full de-chrome treatment with satin black powder coating on all trim, badges, and emblems. Custom LED headlights with Hella 500 driving lamps and a carbon fiber front grille (mesh-style, hand-woven).
